examples: Lactic acid production from sucrose and sugar cane bagasse by Rhizopus oryzae was studied.
The liquefaction of bagasse was studied in order to explore a new way for its use.
The anaerobic treatment of bagasse wastewater by a series of experiments is studied.
Its cogeneration units produce 537 megawatts of electricity annually from sugarcane bagasse--enough to power a small city like Belgaum.
Alternative fuels such as bagasse and shoot are used instead of bunker oil.
